name: Small Gunpowder Barrels
description: A set of 4 barrels. They have a small blast radius and seem harmless, but together they create a large damage area.

name: Small Flaming Barrels
description: A set of 2 barrels. After exploding, they leave a smoke screen and a burning resin spot on the water. Great for escaping pursuit.

name: Small Phosphorous Barrels
description: A set of 3 barrels. Explosions slow enemy ships.

name: Large Phosphorous Mine
description: A mine hidden underwater and invisible to enemies. It has a huge blast radius and creates a breach in the enemy ship's hull upon detonation.

name: Large Shrapnel Mines
description: Mines hidden underwater and invisible to enemies. Dropping 4 mines simultaneously covers a large area. It slows down ships upon detonation.

name: Fire Ship
description: Send a boat with a gunpowder barrow charge toward the targeted enemy! 3 sailors and 3 boarders will be sacrificed. You will see a highlight when the launch is possible.
